chants.title: Triple Gem (Ti-Ratana)
chants.text_pali:
Buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
Dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
Saṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

Dutiyampi Buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
Dutiyampi Dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
Dutiyampi Saṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

Tatiyampi Buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
Tatiyampi Dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
Tatiyampi Saṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
chants.text_english:
I go to the Buddha for refuge.
I go to the Dhamma for refuge.
I go to the Sangha for refuge.

For the second time, I go to the Buddha for refuge.
For the second time, I go to the Dhamma for refuge.
For the second time, I go to the Sangha for refuge.

For the third time, I go to the Buddha for refuge.
For the third time, I go to the Dhamma for refuge.
For the third time, I go to the Sangha for refuge.

chants.title: Five Precepts (Pañca Sīla)
chants.text_pali:
Pāṇātipātā veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ samādiyāmi.
Adinnādānā veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ samādiyāmi.
Kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ samādiyāmi.
Musāvādā veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ samādiyāmi.
Surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ samādiyāmi.
chants.text_english:
I undertake the training rule to abstain from taking life.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from taking what is not given.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from sexual misconduct.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from false speech.
I undertake the training rule to abstain from intoxicants causing heedlessness.

chants.title: Metta Sutta (Loving-Kindness)
chants.text_pali:
Karaṇīyam-atthakusalena
Yanta santaṃ padaṃ abhisamecca:
Sakko ujū ca suhujū ca,
Sūvaco cassa mudu anatimānī.
chants.text_english:
This is what should be done by one who is skilled in goodness,
Who has understood the path of peace:
Let them be able and upright, straightforward and gentle in speech,
Humble and not conceited.

chants.title: Mangala Sutta (Blessings)
chants.text_english:
Though one may create a thousand arms and eleven heads,
May prosperity be yours through one word of truth.

chants.title: Ratana Sutta (Jewels)
chants.text_pali:
Yānīdha bhūtāni samāgatāni,
Bhummāni vā yāni va antalikkhe;
Sabbeva bhūtā sumanā bhavantu,
Athopi sakkacca suṇantu bhāsitaṃ.
chants.text_english:
Whatever beings have gathered here,
On earth or in the sky,
May all beings be happy,
And listen carefully to what is spoken.
